## Purpose

Describe the experiment-design or evidence problem this change addresses.

## Boundaries checked

- [ ] Random assignment is never inferred from the uploaded outcomes.
- [ ] Continuous and binary estimands remain correctly labeled.
- [ ] Practical-effect bounds remain separate from p-values.
- [ ] Exploratory contrasts and multiplicity remain visible.
- [ ] No proprietary course or private third-party material was copied.

## Verification

- [ ] Tests pass.
- [ ] Ruff passes.
- [ ] Documentation and fictional examples are updated.
